holdings.infoBox: RNWZ is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are American Electric Power Company stock at 9.67%, RWE Aktiengesellschaft at 8.71%, Enel SpA at 7.60%, NextEra Energy at 6.48%, and HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital at 6.38%.

overview.description: The TrueShares Eagle Global Renewable Energy Income ETF (RNWZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund seeks long-term capital growth by actively managing a portfolio of renewable energy infrastructure companies from across the globe. RNWZ was launched on Dec 8, 2022 and is issued by Truemark Group.
